title: JeeJaan® 200 Large Black Bin Bags Extra Heavy Duty for Household Garbage Capacity 100L–Strong Black Refuse Sacks - Bin Liners for Everyday use - (18" x 29" x 39")
features: ✅ JEEJAAN BIN BAGS: Introducing JeeJaan Black Plastic Bin Bags, large-sized bags in a pack & rolls. These waste bags can lift heavy items. Suitable for bins around 80 litres, they're perfect for collecting garbage and waste

✅ ECO-FRIENDLY MATERIALS: Our heavy-duty bin liners are crafted from thick, strong, and eco-friendly materials. Made from 100% low-density polyethene recycling (LDPE) plastic, they are perfect for kitchen, industrial, home, office, work, and garden waste. Love your environment with every use!

✅ STRONG & SECURE: Our bin liners are designed for strength and durability. Thanks to the extrusion layering process, they can lift heavy items of waste without failing. They are also leak-proof, ensuring your trash bin stays clean and odour-free.

✅ MULTI PURPOSE: Our bin bags are versatile and can be used for various purposes. Whether indoor or outdoor use, in the kitchen, office, living room, bedroom, or bathroom, they are perfect for managing waste. They are also ideal for disposing of dog and cat waste, car trash, pet litter, and much more.

✅ CUSTOMER SATISFACTION: We are dedicated to providing high-quality bin bags that meet your expectations. Our commitment to environmental responsibility ensures that our products not only meet your needs but also minimize their impact on the environment.
description: Product Description Strength & Durability Our Black Bin Bags are engineered for exceptional strength and durability, making them the ideal choice for all your waste disposal needs. Crafted from high-density polythene, these bags are designed to withstand heavy loads and resist punctures and tears. Whether you’re dealing with sharp objects, bulky waste, or everyday refuse, our bin bags offer reliable performance without compromising on quality. The robust construction ensures that the bags hold up under pressure, reducing the risk of leaks and spills. This durability makes them perfect for demanding environments like offices, industrial sites, and outdoor areas. Size & Capacity Our Black Refuse Sacks offer 90-litres in capacity and (18” x 29” x 39”) in size, to meet all your waste management needs. Available in a thickness of 50mu (Microns), our bags cater to various applications, from small household tasks to larger commercial and industrial uses. Each bag is designed with a generous capacity to handle substantial amounts of waste efficiently. Whether you're managing kitchen scraps, garden debris, or company refuse, Garden Sacks provide ample space to accommodate your needs without the hassle of frequent changes. Our Flat Top Trash Bags feature a reliable design that fits standard bin sizes snugly, reducing the risk of overflows and ensuring a secure fit. Leakproof Our Trash Bin Bags are designed with a focus on leakproof performance to ensure clean and efficient waste management. Constructed from high-density polyethylene, these bags provide exceptional resistance to leaks and spills, even with heavy or wet waste. The robust material and strong seams prevent unwanted punctures and tears, reducing the risk of leaks that can lead to messy cleanups. Whether you’re disposing of food scraps, garden debris, or industrial waste, our leakproof design ensures that your trash stays contained, protecting your surroundings from potential messes. Recyclable Our Refuse Sacks are an eco-safe choice, designed with sustainability in mind. Made from recyclable materials, these bags help reduce environmental impact while efficiently managing your waste. Our commitment to eco-conscious products means that Bin Liners are manufactured to support recycling efforts. By choosing these bags, you’re not only ensuring a reliable solution for your waste management needs but also contributing to a cleaner planet. The recyclable nature of these bags allows for easy disposal and processing, making them a responsible choice for both home and commercial use. Versatile Usage of Black Bin Bags Kitchen Waste Tough and reliable, JeeJaan Black Refuse Bags handle heavy kitchen waste with ease. Durable and puncture-resistant, they keep your kitchen clean and tidy. Perfect for daily use with a sleek, concealing design. Garden Waste Black Bin Bags are perfect for garden waste. Tough and puncture-resistant, they handle leaves, grass, and other debris with ease. Durable and reliable, they simplify garden cleanup and keep your yard tidy. Street Waste The Black Trash Bags are ideal for street waste. Built tough and puncture-resistant, they handle bulky trash and debris with ease. Durable and reliable, they keep streets clean and manageable. Company Waste Our Refuse Sacks are perfect for company waste. Sturdy and puncture-resistant, they handle office and industrial trash efficiently. Durable and reliable, they keep your workplace clean and organized. Introducing JeeJaan black plastic bin bags, a pack of 200 large-sized bags. These waste bags measure (18" x 29 "x 39") and can lift heavy items, with a thickness of 50microns (200 Gauge). Suitable for bins around 80 litres, they're perfect for collecting garbage and waste. Our extensive range of bin bags offers versatile solutions for all your waste disposal needs, combining durability, reliability, and eco-friendliness. Kitchen bin liners and food waste bags, available in recyclable options, are ideal for managing kitchen scraps and organic waste sustainably. For garden maintenance, our garden waste bags, including extra heavy-duty garden waste bags and large garden waste bags, handle substantial volumes of leaves and debris with ease. Our bin sacks, large bin bags, and large bin liners cater to larger waste volumes, and our plastic bin bags and rubbish bags ensure reliable performance for various waste types. Additionally, our garden sacks, garden bags, and garden rubbish bags extra heavy duty are designed to tackle garden refuse effectively. With bin liners and black bin liners to protect your bins, our range delivers superior performance across all waste management tasks, offering practical and clean solutions. Brand JeeJaan Product Dimensions 18" x 29" x 39" Quantity 200 Bags in a Pack Thickness 50 Micron/200 Guage Material Plastic Colour Black Capacity 80 Litres Scent Unscented Type Loose Recyclable 100% Package Weight 9.24 KG Item Weight 46 grams
